narrative:
Salem 1 (Oak Harbor) (precinct in Ottawa County) has 629 registered voters, with 57.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.5 percentage points.
